LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY E. HELD, PH.D., P.E.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT MEETS THE REQUIREMENTS OF PROPOSITION 65. (HEALTH & SAFETY CODE 25249.7(F)(4).)PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Anthony E. Held, Ph.D., P.E.'s motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement meets the requirements of Proposition 65. (Health & Safety Code 25249.7(f)(4).)

Plaintiff's proposed order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
